login.cardSubtitle: Use your work email and password.

errors.missingEmailForReset: Enter your email above first, then click reset.

login.footer: Account requests go through your administrator.

setup.title: Kanban setup
setup.subtitle: First-run configuration
setup.footer: Configuration is uploaded to your Flexweg site as config.js. Re-running the form overwrites it.

welcome.heading: Welcome to your Kanban
welcome.intro: This first-run setup wires the Kanban to a Firebase project for data + authentication, then to your Flexweg site for ticket attachments. It takes about two minutes once you have a Firebase project.
welcome.firebaseBody: The Kanban needs a free Firebase project (Spark plan is fine — no billing required). You'll need its Web app config plus an Authentication user that will become the bootstrap admin. Email/Password sign-in must be enabled.

setup.intro: Enter your Firebase Web app config and the email of your bootstrap admin. The admin must already exist as a Firebase Auth user — create it manually in the Firebase Console first.
setup.introFlexweg: Provide your Flexweg API key — the Kanban uses Flexweg's Files API to upload ticket attachments AND to persist the config so every team member's browser boots without re-running this form.

help.firebase: Copy these values from Firebase Console → Project settings → Your apps → Web app config.
help.admin: The Firebase Auth user that gets admin rights without needing a Firestore users/{uid} record. Must already exist — create it from Firebase Console → Authentication → Users.
help.flexweg: Find these values in your Flexweg account dashboard.
help.flexwegApiKeyHint: Generate a permanent API key in your

errors.missingFields: Some required fields are missing or invalid.
errors.firebaseAuthInvalidCredentialHint: Double-check the admin email + password from the Firebase Console (Authentication → Users). Email/Password sign-in must be enabled for this project.
errors.wrongAdminEmail: The Firebase account you signed in with does not match the admin email you typed. Try again.
errors.firebaseAuthUserNotFound: No Firebase account matches that email.
errors.firebaseInvalidApiKey: Firebase API key is invalid. Re-check the apiKey field.
errors.firebaseTooManyRequests: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.firebaseOperationNotAllowed: Email/Password sign-in is not enabled for this Firebase project. Enable it in Firebase Console → Authentication → Sign-in method.
errors.flexwegAuth: Flexweg API key rejected. Check the value from your Flexweg account → API.
errors.flexwegNetwork: Network error contacting Flexweg. Check the API base URL and your connection.
errors.firestoreRulesHint: Open Firebase Console → Firestore → Rules and confirm that the bootstrap admin email matches: {{email}}.
errors.uploadFailed: Could not upload config.js to Flexweg
